solution: 
```class Solution:
    def minPartitions(self, n: str) -> int:
        return max(int(digit) for digit in n)
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution works by finding the maximum digit in the string representation of the number. This maximum digit represents the minimum number of deci-binary numbers needed to sum up to the given number, as each deci-binary number can contribute at most 1 to each digit. The use of a generator expression within the built-in max function allows for an efficient and Pythonic solution.
